name: Blackeyed Peas Spinach
recipeIngredient: 2 cups blackeyed peas, cooked in the pressure cooker (10-15 minutes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the blackeyed peas in the pressure cooker for 10-15 minutes.
2. In a saucepan, sauté the onion and garlic mixture until transparent.
3. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until they break down slightly.
4. Stir in the pureed garlic/onion mixture, curry powder, and bean water (from cooking the peas).
5. Add the spinach and continue to cook on low heat until wilted and mostly dry.
6. Season with a squeeze of lemon juice and optional nonfat yogurt.
